text: A baker makes cookies each day. On Day 1 she makes 3 cookies, on Day 2 she makes 6 cookies, on Day 3 she makes 9 cookies, and on Day 4 she makes 12 cookies. How many cookies will she make on Day 5?
generatorSolution:
The pattern increases by 3 each day:
Day 1: 3
Day 2: 6 (3 + 3)
Day 3: 9 (6 + 3)
Day 4: 12 (9 + 3)
Day 5: 12 + 3 = 15

The rule is: number of cookies = 3 × day number. On Day 5: 3 × 5 = 15.

The answer is 15.
